parameters.query: ={{ "SELECT id, code, discount_percent, max_uses, times_used, is_active, expires_at FROM coupons WHERE UPPER(code) = UPPER('" + $node['Parse Body & Generate Code'].json.coupon_code.replace(/'/g, '') + "') AND is_active = true LIMIT 1;" }}
SELECT price_cents FROM pricing_rules WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY id LIMIT 1;

={{ "INSERT INTO tokens (code, email, status, price_paid, coupon_id, expires_at) VALUES ('" + $json.token_code + "', '" + $json.email.replace(/'/g, "''") + "', 'active', 0, " + ($json.coupon_id ? $json.coupon_id : 'NULL') + ", NOW() + INTERVAL '30 days') RETURNING id, code;" }}

={{ "INSERT INTO tokens (code, email, status, price_paid, coupon_id) VALUES ('" + $json.token_code + "', '" + $json.email.replace(/'/g, "''") + "', 'pending_payment', " + $json.final_price_cents + ", " + ($json.coupon_id ? $json.coupon_id : 'NULL') + ") RETURNING id, code;" }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ token_code: $node['Build PayFast Fields'].json.token_code, fields: $node['Build PayFast Fields'].json.payfast_fields, payfast_url: $node['Build PayFast Fields'].json.payfast_url }) }}
